title: Sabo Clashes with Fujitora
description: Pages 1–5 focus on sabo clashes with fujitora, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Marines, Sabo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as sabo confronts the Marines and Fujitora while Luffy's group keeps moving toward the palace and Dressrosa's decisive battle.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: I thought we told you to retreat! Back! Get back!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: SABO vs. Marines!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why are you attack- ing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's a Logia- User!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This bastard ...His fingers... they're crazy strong!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: They're Talons.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Move! There's nothing you lot can do anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My fingers...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: DRAGON'S TALONS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They will rent the power of the arrogant.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Those are my Talons!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral Bastille's Shark cutter knife!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Something like a human skull...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Damn you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I can simply crush like an egg!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Craack

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I wonder...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This bird cage contraption appears to be in the way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I wonder if it's capable of sliding up even my meteor?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Haul ass! It's a freakin' meteor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: WAA AAA a!!!! hhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Oh dear, this won't do...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The attack radius is much wider now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I do hope citizens haven't been injured!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Please, Admiral Isshow, a heads up before you start dropping meters!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Ah, yes. Forgive me. I have dropped a meteor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Before!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: My friend, do you happen to be aware of the predicament you are in?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Geez, I still ain't used to this power at all. I keep tryin' to dodge everything!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Aaah! Vice Admiral Bastille!

summary: Sabo Clashes with Fujitora develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Marines, Sabo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
